chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 788 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.3046/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Shahani, learned counsel for the Petitioners and submits that he has been instructed by the latter not to press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
